pdg_node.informal_desc: Create an immutable vehicle geometry/state model from explicit axle-length parameters.

declaration.name: constructgeometrymodel
declaration.type_signature: (length_front: float, length_rear: float) -> ModelSpec
declaration.docstring: Create an immutable vehicle geometry/state model from explicit axle-length parameters.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Immutable Asymmetric Offset Configuration. Constructs a canonical configuration object from two non-negative scalar offsets defined on opposite sides of a reference origin. The transform is a direct parameter-to-structure mapping with boundary validation, without optimization, recursion, or stochastic sampling. The resulting artifact is immutable, preserving the input values as fixed geometric/state invariants.. Applications: Robotics: instantiate a rigid-link kinematic segment model from proximal and distal link extents around a joint origin., Materials engineering: define an immutable cross-section descriptor from layer thicknesses on opposite sides of a neutral axis., Computational imaging: encode asymmetric sensor active-region margins (left/right or near/far) into a fixed calibration schema., Neuroscience modeling: represent asymmetric receptive-field spatial extents around a central reference point in a simulation state object.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Deserialize model geometry parameters from storage into an immutable model spec.

declaration.name: loadmodelfromfile
declaration.type_signature: (filename: string) -> ModelSpec
declaration.docstring: Deserialize model geometry parameters from storage into an immutable model spec.
declaration.conceptual_summary: ImmutableStructuredSpecHydration. Accepts a locator to persisted serialized data, reads the byte stream, and decodes it using a predefined schema into a typed in-memory parameter structure. The reconstructed structure is then frozen so downstream computations can rely on referential stability and mutation-free semantics.. Applications: Hydrating finite-element mesh and boundary-condition specifications for mechanical simulation from a persisted artifact., Loading calibrated kinematic-chain parameters for robotic motion planning from a configuration file., Reconstructing neuroimaging preprocessing pipeline parameter sets from stored manifests for reproducible analysis., Restoring compiler optimization-pass configuration graphs from serialized build metadata.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Project front length, rear length, and derived wheelbase from the immutable model spec.

declaration.name: querygeometryparameters
declaration.type_signature: (model_spec: ModelSpec) -> tuple[float, float, float]
declaration.docstring: Project front length, rear length, and derived wheelbase from the immutable model spec.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Bipartite Scalar Projection with Additive Extent Derivation. The operation reads two non-negative scalar components from an immutable structured input and returns them directly as explicit outputs. It then computes a third scalar by linear addition of those components, producing a total 1D extent. No state is changed, and the mapping is fully deterministic.. Applications: Genomics: expose upstream/downstream sequence segment lengths and derive total amplicon span., Network engineering: expose forward/reverse path propagation delays and derive round-trip baseline delay., Manufacturing process planning: expose pre-process/post-process motion distances and derive total traverse distance., Signal processing: expose pre-event/post-event window durations and derive full analysis window length.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Compute sideslip from steering input and vehicle geometry as a pure kinematic transform.

declaration.name: computesideslipangle
declaration.type_signature: (model_spec: ModelSpec, road_wheel_angle: float) -> float
declaration.docstring: Compute sideslip from steering input and vehicle geometry as a pure kinematic transform.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Kinematic Deflection-to-Drift Angle Projection. Maps a single control deflection angle and fixed rigid-body geometry parameters to an instantaneous orientation offset angle using a closed-form trigonometric relation. The transform is purely kinematic (no forces, no integration over time): it projects local actuator deflection into global trajectory-direction deviation relative to a body-aligned reference axis. Zero input deflection yields zero output offset, and output sign follows input sign under symmetric parameterization.. Applications: Planar mobile robotics: convert steering-joint deflection and platform geometry into trajectory-heading offset for path tracking., Aerospace guidance: map control-surface deflection and airframe geometry to instantaneous flight-path angular deviation in simplified kinematic models., Catheter/continuum-tool navigation: translate proximal angular actuation and segment geometry into tip-direction offset estimates., Computer graphics/animation kinematics: derive motion-direction offset from joint rotation and rig geometry for procedural locomotion.
